top_signals.title: NATO’s newest member Sweden announces $4 billion defense investment; Saab pops 5%
top_signals.summary: Sweden joined the military alliance in 2024 after it said that Russia's invasion of Ukraine had changed the security landscape.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Putin in Beijing: 3 things Russia needs from China
top_signals.summary: Russia will be looking for energy and trade deals with China, as well as continuing geopolitical support.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.
